summary: Another entry in USCIS's Alien Registration Requirement PSA series, this one titled 'The Cost of Inaction.' It pairs an ARR logo card and a USCIS.gov/alienregistration card with captioned voiceover narration warning of fines and incarceration, over stock B-roll of a man being handcuffed and detainees on an ICE detention bus. It is a narration-driven compliance/threat PSA with on-screen captions transcribing the speech, not a music-driven or genre-styled youth-appeal video.
notable_text: ARR Alien Registration Requirement; THE COST OF INACTION; If you fail to comply, ... and incarceration; FOR MORE INFO: USCIS.GOV/ALIENREGISTRATION; Aliens are encouraged to visit
